Petition For Instructions And For Settlement Of Trust Account
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions And For Settlement Of Trust Account
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Sep-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And For Settlement Of Trust Account
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Continued To Aug-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Kinyon for Wells Fargo Bank.

Discussions were held with regard to the manner in which the property was to be divided and the difficulty in getting the property appraised. The matter was continued to August 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard with the Trust matter and for Mr. Kinyon to go back to the drawing board to determine a more sensible way to distribute the property.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
